name: C.I. Medical Co.,Ltd.
summary: C.I. Medical Co.,Ltd. develops, manufactures, and sells dental care products in Japan. The company offers toothbrushes; and other dental care products through mail order sales. It serves medical cooperatives, dental clinics, dental associations, health centers, dental colleges, hospitals, veterinary clinics, nursing home care facilities, and dental dealers. C.I. Medical Co.,Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Hakusan, Japan.
